reason: Authoritative lint + test bar — verify `dart format .` / `flutter analyze` / `flutter test` all pass; new widget tests cover: dynamic insertion/removal of 电影台词 Tab when subtitleOnlyMode flips, basic-tab card mutual exclusion (B/C), orientation card side-effect (切横向时关闭 subtitleOnlyMode), and the responsive bottom-sheet / right-dock dual path.

Re-check widget structure on every touched widget — StitchControlsPanel (TabBar + TabBarView rewrite), new card widgets (no unnecessary Container, const constructors, MD3 surface usage, 48dp a11y hit areas for cards).

Re-check Compact / Medium / Expanded layouts — TabBar height + TabBarView content must fit within the re-estimated StitchControlsSheet maxHeight (260~400 dp) without clipping; right-docked Expanded path renders the same Tab structure without horizontal overflow on the cards row.

Re-check atomic setter contract — selectMovieSubtitleMode / toggleOrientation must emit a single state update (no double-emit observable to Consumer widgets). Verify no test or call site bypasses the new setters by chaining setMode + setSubtitleOnlyMode separately.
Re-check exhaustive StitchMode coverage in all new orientation / mode conditionals — including the orientation card label switch and any Tab visibility predicates.
Re-check provider invocation patterns in new widgets — ref.read for actions, ref.watch for reactive UI; no listener leaks, no missing select() where rebuild scope can be narrowed.
